channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lampost not working, 23rd March
item.description:
Lampost has not been working for a while, it’s very dark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Beverley Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped near the bottom of the footbridge, 23rd March
item.description:
This rubbish, some in bags and some loose, has been accumulating over the past few days. Attracting foxes who are distributing it stones the neighbourhood.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bracondale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping in Alleyway, 23rd March
item.description:
Broken down fence in alleyway which has caused fly-tipping including a large fridge freezer. Been there for at least 8 months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car battery dumped on pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
A car battery has been dumped on the kerbside, close to 1 Hilldrop Road. The battery is inside a cardboard box with a name and address label (see photo), 51 Peters Path, SE26 6LE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hilldrop Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Making loud noise, 23rd March
item.description:
The man hole cover makes a loud noise everytime it’s driven over by a car and even louder noise when it’s driven over by a lorry.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cabinets on street in disrepair, 23rd March
item.description:
Cabinets in terrible state, one with doors broken off exposing wiring inside. Other has broken door, exposing wiring inside. Please can you contact the relevant utility owner and have them replaced. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Croxted Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 abandoned hopping trolley, 23rd March
item.description:
There are two abandoned shopping trolleys (one LIDL and one Costco). I have tried to contact the supermarkets directly and Trolleywise but no response.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13-56, Tyers Gate, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti - bus stop, 23rd March
item.description:
See photos

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Overflowing bins and fly tipping in this area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Fly tipping all over the estate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Fly tipping all over the estate for more than a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Fly tipping all over the estate for more than a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three round potholes, 23rd March
item.description:
Three round potholes near long thin potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 287, Pickhurst Lane, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long thin pot holes, 23rd March
item.description:
Number of long potholes in carriage way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 285, Pickhurst Lane, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped shopping trolly, 23rd March
item.description:
Dumped Morrusons shopping trolly at the end of The Close cul-de-sac
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge bird cage left next to tree, 23rd March
item.description:
A huge bird cage was left on the pavement next to a tree after it was taken out from a neighbouring flat after sundown tonight. It’s on the corner of Mortimer and Downham Road. If it tips over it is also a health and safety hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mortimer Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes, 23rd March
item.description:
Multiple potholes on Barnfield Wood Road from the roundabout up to and beyond Fairway Gardens. Some feel a couple of inches deep and are particular hazard to cyclists (especially when using middle of road to avoid all the parked cars).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 102, Barnfield Wood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish left here, 23rd March
item.description:
Large amount of rubbish left here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised street tree on Norhwold Road opp Alconbury Road x 3, 23rd March
item.description:
Vandalised street trees (sapling) x 3. Along Northwold Road starting opp Alconbury Road moving east. All 3 broken trunk at height of metal cage. Must have occured weekend 21 / 22 march 2026
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of mattesses on Southey Road, 23rd March
item.description:
Two mattresses dumped on Southey Road next to Hermes Court, appears to be fly-tipping. Lots of dumped rubbish nearby too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southey Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
